full_description: Pick up the gray target block, inspect the colored pad on its back side, and place it on the pad with the matching color.
schema: {A} denotes the gray target block with a colored pad on its back side, {B} denotes the matching color pad, {a} denotes the arm used to move the block, {C} denotes the back-side pad color
preference: Mention sorting by the colored pad on the block's back side. Keep instructions concise.
seen: Pick up {A} and place it on {B}.
Use {a} to inspect the back of {A}, then move it onto the matching {C} pad.
Grab {A}, identify the {C} pad on its back side, and set it on {B}.
Lift {A}, check its back-side pad color, then put it down on the corresponding color pad.
Move the gray block to the pad matching the color on its back.
unseen: Place the gray block on the pad matching its back-side color.
Pick the gray block and sort it by the colored pad on its back.
Move the block to the correct color pad after checking its back.

seen: inspect the back-side pad color on {A}
restore {A} to the carried pose after inspection
unseen: return the block from the inspection pose

seen: place {A} on {B} according to the back-side pad color
unseen: put the block on the matching color pad
